# growthbook_metric_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook metric group by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique metric group identifier (e.g. `mg_...`).

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the metric group is archived.
- `datasource` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `description` (String) Metric group description.
- `metrics` (List of String) Ordered list of metric IDs in the group.
- `name` (String) Metric group name.
- `owner` (String) Metric group owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs the metric group is scoped to.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the metric group.
